n8n serves over 3,000 enterprise customers including Fortune-level brands
34% of Fortune 500 companies use n8n enterprise features
The global workflow automation market is projected to reach $37.45B by 2030 with a CAGR of 9.52%
n8n 2.0 (January 2026) introduced native LangChain integration and 70+ AI nodes
n8n has 9,600+ community workflow templates available for free
n8n self-hosted Community Edition is free with unlimited executions; cloud VPS costs $3-7/month
n8n Cloud pricing: Starter €24/mo (2,500 executions), Pro €60/mo (10,000 executions), Business €800/mo
Zapier has 7,000+ integrations vs. n8n's 400+ native integrations (but n8n supports any API via HTTP node)
You can build a working AI chatbot connected to Telegram, Slack, or Discord in under an hour with n8n

angles: n8n 2.0 in January 2026 transformed the platform into a true AI agent builder — this is the angle beginners need to know first
Free alternative story: n8n Community Edition is free forever vs. Zapier's expensive task-based pricing — developers can build unlimited automations at zero cost
Code-optional positioning: n8n is for developers who want flexibility without being locked into no-code limitations, unlike Zapier or Make
From zero to first AI workflow in 30 minutes — practical, time-boxed tutorial angle that addresses beginner anxiety
Real-world starter projects: AI email responder, Telegram chatbot, Google Sheets automation — show concrete use cases beginners can replicate immediately

n8n beats Zapier on price at scale but requires more setup — honest tradeoffs analysis attracts technical beginners
n8n's native LangChain and MCP integration makes it the go-to for AI agent builders in 2026
